MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON NOV-06-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DONALD CHOI'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE BUT APPLICANT HAS UNTIL 12/6 TO PAY ALL COURT FEES AND COSTS OWED TO THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
